name: CK Life OS - Calendar Write Preflight

parameters.jsCode: const body = $json.body || $json; const approved = !!body.calendar_target && !!body.event_preview && body.write === true && !!body.rollback_plan && !!body.approval_reference; return [{ json: { product: 'CK / Life OS', workflow_id: 'ck-life-os-calendar-write-preflight', approved, required: ['calendar_target', 'event_preview', 'write=true', 'rollback_plan', 'approval_reference'], calendar_write: false, external_send: false, rollback: 'Delete created event by event id or restore/import prior ICS backup if a later write is approved.' } }];

staticData.ck_life_os_boundary: disabled import; no calendar writes by default
